case_title: DONALD M. HERBERT VS. HOSAIN SADEQUR RAHMAN

docket_entries.description: REQUEST TO POSTPONE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING (REQUEST FORWARDED TO DEPT 506 FOR JUDICIAL REVIEW & SIGNATURE.) FILED BY PLAINTIFF HERBERT, DONALD M.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-14-2020 - CONTINUED TO JUN-26-2020 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506
REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY TELEPHONE (SMALL CLAIMS)- GRANTED FILED BY PLAINTIFF HERBERT, DONALD M.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $8,842.00 FILED BY HERBERT, DONALD M. AS TO DEFENDANT RAHMAN, HOSAIN SADEQUR ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-18-2020 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY TELEPHONE (SMALL CLAIMS) FILED BY PLAINTIFF HERBERT, DONALD M.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED JAN-29-2020, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT RAHMAN, HOSAIN SADEQUR

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-26-2020 - CONTINUED ON COURT'S OWN MOTION TO OCT-16-2020 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. NO APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF. NO APPEARANCES BY DEFENDANT. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(506)
REMARK: RETURNED MAIL: SMALL CLAIMS CONTINUE ORDER MAILED TO DEFENDANT ON 05/27/20. PER U.S. POSTAL SERVICE, "RETURN TO SENDER - ATTEMPTED - NOT KNOWN - UNABLE TO FORWARD."

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HERBERT, DONALD M. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT RAHMAN, HOSAIN SADEQUR $8,842.00 PRINCIPAL, $90.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $8,932.00, PLAINTIFF ADVANCED MONIES FOR DEFENDANT TO PURCHASE AIRLINE TICKETS. DEFENDANT USED THE TICKETS FOR TRAVEL AND OWES PLAINTIFF FOR THE PURCHASE PRICE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF HERBERT, DONALD M. AS TO DEFENDANT RAHMAN, HOSAIN SADEQUR
ORDER ON REQUEST TO POSTPONE THE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING. THE REQUEST IS DENIED. THE REQUEST WAS NOT FILED AT LEAST 10 DAYS BEFORE THE HEARING AND DID NOT INCLUDE A GOOD REASON FOR THE LATE REQUEST.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-18-2020 - CONTINUED TO MAY-14-2020 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506 BY ORDER OF THE COURT. (JR/506)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-16-2020 - JUDGMENT. PLAINTIFF DONALD M. HERBERT IS PRESENT BY COURTCALL. DEFENDANT HOSAIN SADEQUR RAHMAN IS NOT PRESENT. PLAINTIFF EXHIBITS ARE RETAINED. COMMISSIONER PANG LY; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED. (506)
REMARK: EXHIBITS DESTROYED PER THE JUNE 10, 2021 ORDER.
